title: 학교에 짝남/짝녀 있을 때 국룰  | 입시덕후
text: Characteristics of Crush by MBTI Type. I'm rooting for you, the " Entrance Exam Deok" type, who is currently in love. I've compiled responses from people with completely different MBTI types who are experiencing unrequited love, so watch the video until the end. Phew, no over-immersion, just watch for fun. The ultimate "falls in love quickly." Once they get hooked on something, they immediately press the "liking" button. They love running their fantasy circuits, essentially creating a 20-episode melodrama all by themselves. They tend to enjoy the emotion of unrequited love itself, but their expectations for recognition are so high that if there is no reaction, they lose interest instantly. They usually have zero interest in others, but if a friend radiating a halo appears in the hallway, they start to take an interest. Even if that person contacts them, they deliberately do n't reply instantly because they're afraid it will be obvious they like them. However, the

title: 학교에 짝남/짝녀 있을 때 국룰  | 입시덕후
text: ers, but if a friend radiating a halo appears in the hallway, they start to take an interest. Even if that person contacts them, they deliberately do n't reply instantly because they're afraid it will be obvious they like them. However, the " Anti-TJ" type, with their bangs flowing like a flood, starts tailing their tail at a friend who is good at studying and delivers a dazzling presentation with a confident voice. From then on, they make the other person lose their mind with a storm of flirting. If the other person doesn't show any signs of dislike, they start a crush that feels like a confession; they approach their crush so subtly that others wouldn't even notice. The courage to ask directly... If they aren't there but hear information about the ship from the other side, it's like they're the Somers. Most people go to school early and look up profile music just to see their crush, but end up in unrequited love without saying a single word. There's the INT who raises a powerful barrier right in the middle of their heart, thinking about the annoying girl who likes them all day. They pretend to be embarrassed and deny it, saying "Nah, no way," but eventually become a recorded voice of their unrequited love. They usually don't bother to contact you, but reply instantly to your crush's messages. They are the super-social type who loves to have fun as much as Pororo, so if you say you like active hobbies like them, they start to take a liking to you. They start a stormy swoop straight in, making plans first, and reacting with fiery reactions like "Wow, they really said that? That's amazing!" They vow never to show their feelings, but when the guy/ girl appears, a reflex kicks in automatically. Then, if their eyes meet, they turn into human blush. When their ideal type appears, they meticulously gather information about the other person and organize it into a thesis-level summary. They tend to imagine the worst-case scenario, so they just watch from afar, thinking, "It won't work, it wo n't work." There are many cases where people give up thinking, "It's not going to work out." When a crush appears, they figure out the other person's personality and preferences, then pour endless questions on them to see who has tried to match Lee Se-young's standards. Using the data gathered, they look after them from behind while appearing nonchalant. However, they get hurt easily and sulk quickly, so when that friend is hanging out with others, they

title: 학교에 짝남/짝녀 있을 때 국룰  | 입시덕후
text: see who has tried to match Lee Se-young's standards. Using the data gathered, they look after them from behind while appearing nonchalant. However, they get hurt easily and sulk quickly, so when that friend is hanging out with others, they feel like the lone hero of tragedy. Their heart flutters at seeing them effortlessly handle things they are bad at, but their ideal type is incredibly picky, so they don't like just anyone. Once they fall for someone, they become cold and rational. That means they will give their heart and soul to them during gatherings. They are deeply moved by someone who takes care of them first. They have a strong desire to shower them with gifts, but they take care of everyone, including the kids sitting right in front of and next to them, for fear of being caught. They watch the "almost-know-it-all" skill of giving recordings and special gifts only to their crush. If the thought "Do I like them?" crosses their mind, they analyze why they like them, one by one. Playing pranks is their default, but they become infinitely kind in front of the person they like. [Music] Heart flutters when someone suddenly calls you without your last name. A squeaky girl. Limited to the "squeaky girl." Possesses Mongolian eyesight. In the auditorium where the entire student body is gathered. Even if it’s a fact I found in 10 seconds, if the guy says it, I pretend I don’t know and activate my reaction factory at full power. I’m a top-tier "falls in love at first" known for discovering

title: 학교에 짝남/짝녀 있을 때 국룰  | 입시덕후
text: m where the entire student body is gathered. Even if it’s a fact I found in 10 seconds, if the guy says it, I pretend I don’t know and activate my reaction factory at full power. I’m a top-tier "falls in love at first" known for discovering his charm points. I’m a guilty human being who throws out lines like "I’ve discovered my first day," but he doesn’t bite. He has this otherworldly coolness of thinking, "It’s fine as long as he likes me." He’s an Epijay who wants a "smart bird" like me to polish every aspect of things, so when his ideal type appears, he analyzes their interests and hobbies to thoroughly plan what to talk about. Also, he’s curious about everything about the guy, bombarding him with Akinator-level questions. He has a kind heart and remembers even the quietest things I said with meticulous care. He’s the number one in the world of touching fantasies, so when he starts liking someone, he goes as far as imagining his grandchild grabbing a basketball at their first birthday ceremony. But when he actually runs into me on the way to or from school, he can’t even bring himself to speak. Phew, every coincidence he thinks of was just a scenario I created. So, subscribe and try succeeding at your crush, everyone. Bye. [Music]
